events.name: 1. FC Heidenheim 1846 at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: VfL Bochum and Holstein Kiel were relegated from the Bundesliga on Saturday after defeats by Mainz 05 and Freiburg respectively on the penultimate matchday of the season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bochum, Kiel relegated, Heidenheim get lifeline with win at Union

video.headline: Bochum relegated after 4-1 defeat to Mainz

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (VfL Bochum vs. Mainz - Game Highlights) 2025/05/10 ESHEET

headlines.description: Champions Bayern Munich eased past Borussia Monchengladbach 2-0 in the Bundesliga on Saturday as club icon Thomas Müller bid farewell in his final home game after 25 years at the club.
headlines.shortLinkText: Champions Bayern win in Müller's final home game

video.headline: Michael Olise scores goal for Bayern Munich

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Michael Olise scores goal for Bayern Munich) 2025/05/10 ESHEET
